summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SaaS Analytics Dashboard and new features. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend dashboard displaying analytics with ROI calculations, billing portal properly configured for trial users, and email service initialized.

configuration_notes.issue: Email service disabled due to missing RESEND_API_KEY
configuration_notes.impact: Email notifications not sent (welcome, trial reminders, payment success)
configuration_notes.note: This is expected for development/testing environment

passed_tests: Analytics Overview API (/api/saas/analytics/overview) returning correct data structure
ROI card displaying with cost/value metrics and percentage calculation
All 4 stat cards present (Articles, Sites, Keywords, Backlinks)
Usage progress section showing article quota and progress bar
Performance summary section with detailed stats breakdown
Billing portal endpoint correctly blocking trial users (400 error)
API Keys (BYOAK) endpoints for saving/retrieving user API keys
Plans endpoint returning all subscription plans with correct pricing
Subscription and usage endpoints providing trial user data
Email service initialization (disabled but properly configured)
Trial reminder scheduler configured and running
All existing endpoints (auth, dashboard, search console) still functional
action_item_for_main_agent: All core features working correctly. Optional: Configure RESEND_API_KEY in production for email notifications. No critical issues found.
